name: senga-systems
description: Enterprise cybersecurity and software engineering solutions

scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:copy
scripts.build:copy: mkdir -p public && cp index-new.html public/index.html && cp compliance-audit.html public/ && cp -r css public/ && cp -r js public/ && cp -r assets public/ 2>/dev/null || true
